products.title: Beambox Nikko E-Badge - Silver
products.description: Beambox Nikko E-Badge — AI-powered wearable display badge with full-color screen, app control, and QR code display. From $39.80 USD. Silver color. Reusable electronic badge for events, trade shows, brand activation, cosplay, conferences, and creators. Includes lanyard, pin, and magnetic stand. Bluetooth connectivity, rechargeable battery, iOS and Android app. Key search terms: electronic badge, smart badge, wearable display badge, digital name badge, QR code badge, e-badge, LED name tag alternative.
